title: eranthemum wardii
intro: Eranthemum wardii, also known as the Ward's Lantana, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. Native to the Himalayan region, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Tibetan medicine, where it is used to treat fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties, making it beneficial for reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Eranthemum wardii is often combined with other herbs to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that promote overall well-being.
